    W

    waitDao - Variable in class logicControllers.SubscribesReportController
     
    WaitDate - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Date the user is waiting for.
    WAITING - Enum constant in enum class enums.WaitingStatus
     
    waitingList - Variable in class Entities.WaitingList
    List of all entries in the waiting list.
    WaitingList - Class in Entities
    Represents a waiting list for a single day in the restaurant.
    WaitingList(LocalDate) - Constructor for class Entities.WaitingList
    Constructs a new WaitingList for the specified date.
    WaitingListController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for the Waiting List UI.
    WaitingListController - Class in logicControllers
    Controller responsible for managing the restaurant's waiting list and real-time reservation logic.

    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing the restaurant's waiting list.

    waitingListDate - Variable in class Entities.WaitingList
    The date for which this waiting list applies.
    WaitingListEntry - Class in Entities
    Represents an entry in the restaurant waiting list.
    WaitingListEntry(Integer, String, String, int, int, LocalDate, LocalTime, ExitReason) - Constructor for class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Constructs a waiting list entry without specifying the status.
    WaitingListEntry(Integer, String, String, int, int, LocalDate, LocalTime, ExitReason, WaitingStatus) - Constructor for class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Constructs a waiting list entry with all fields.
    waitingListTable - Variable in class Controllers.WaitingListController

    Represents the status of a customer in the waiting list.

    WAITLIST - Enum constant in enum class enums.ReservationStatus
    The reservation is on the waiting list.
    WaitTime - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Time the user is waiting for.
    Wednesday - Enum constant in enum class enums.RestaurantSettingsDays

    weekData - Variable in class Entities.Report
    List of weekly data, relevant for subscribers reports.
    WeekData - Class in Entities
    Represents weekly data for the restaurant.

    weeklyOpeningHours - Variable in class Entities.RestaurantSettings
    List of regular weekly opening hours.
    WeeklyOpeningHours - Class in Entities
    Represents the opening and closing hours for a specific weekday.

    Constructs a new WeeklyOpeningHours object with the specified opening and closing times and day.

    Handles server responses containing weekly waiting list entries.
